current_commit_message: WIP: On-going improvements to HyperSpace, Category, Dependency and Storage Manager (file-system implementation). In particular, for Category traversal.
WIP: Improve "src/aiko_services/elements/colab/" to integrate YOLOE example and ChatServer using "pipelines/colab_pipeline_1.json".

Initial commit new example "src/aiko_services/examples/system_pipelines/". WIP: Intended to demonstrate a combined main Pipeline (overall data flow), using a remote Pipeline containing a YOLOE detection PipelineElement. The intention is to identify and improve the key "gaps" and "issues" with the current design and implementation.
WIP: Improve "src/aiko_services/examples/colab" to include audio processing.
